emergency.label: All Purpose
emergency.number: 112 (same unified system as rest of Turkey)

entryRequirements.visaNote: Same as Istanbul: e-Visa online in advance for many nationalities, some nationalities visa-free. Turkey is not in the Schengen Area — separate system.

transportInfo.paymentCard: Antalyakart (local transit card, separate system from Istanbulkart)
transportInfo.note: Antalya is Turkey's resort/beach hub — most visitors stay in coastal resort areas outside the city center itself.

publicHolidays2026: Same national Turkish holidays as Istanbul — see batch 1 Istanbul entry.
majorEventsNote: Peak beach season (Jun-Sep) drives massive resort pricing; this is a summer resort city more than a year-round urban destination.
